rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini for description based on visual verification and its more detailed note regarding ambiguity. Both agreed on row_type and no amounts. 'Annavagia' is a more accurate reading from the image than 'Ansararagia'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms the description is 'Juo' (not 'Tue') and that this row is a header with no monetary amounts, only an 'X' mark. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned amounts from the following row and misidentified row type.

Visual verification: description is 'Calcutt pro Mic' (from gpt-5-mini, visually confirmed). Amounts are 2 pounds, 15 shillings, 7 pence (from gemini-flash, visually confirmed). gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted pounds/shillings from the subsequent row for its corresponding entry.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms amounts as 1 pound, 9 shillings, 7 pence. The 'q' next to the pence clearly indicates a 0.25 fraction (farthing). gpt-5-mini misread pence as 2 and missed the fraction.
Visual verification confirms description 'Tridennio' (from gpt-5-mini) and pence value '7' (from gemini-flash). Pounds and shillings are agreed upon.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Visual verification confirms description from gemini-flash is more accurate for 'Southbrington' and the ending abbreviations ('wch', 'sepr'). gpt-5-mini's notes correctly identify fuzziness in parts of its own description.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms 'Gentlemen Commoners' is a header row with no associated amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this with the following entry and misread 'Commoners' as 'Coroners'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms this is an entry with amount '16 00 00', correctly separated from the preceding header. gpt-5-mini omitted this as a distinct row by merging it with the header.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms 'per nos' is on a separate line below this header. gpt-5-mini incorrectly included 'per nos' in this header row.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms 'per nos' is a distinct entry row. gpt-5-mini omitted this row by merging it with the preceding header.
